history.qwen_observation: The build failed on JDK 11 with `NoClassDefFoundError: javax/xml/bind/JAXBException` because JAXB modules were removed from the JDK starting in Java 11.
history.qwen_rationale: Adding explicit `javax.xml.bind:jaxb-api` and `org.glassfish.jaxb:jaxb-runtime` dependencies to the first step restores the missing JAXB classes to the compiler classpath, allowing the project to compile on JDK 11 before proceeding with further Java version upgrades.
